text:
affliction to the fourth
house may result in the shape of depriving the person of
peace of mind, causing misfortune to his mother, troubles
in regard to property affairs and so on. But in reality, a
person may be educated but may also lose his mother early.
He may command good immovable properties but may not
be happy. Most of us seek to use astrology from a practical
point of view. I have endeavoured to deal with each
signification of a bhava separately. The greatest difficulty
in astrology is to differentiate the different events
comprehended by a bhava. And the procedure adopted by
me is designed to obviate this difficulty to some extent.
Primary Considerations
Before analysing the fourth bhava, one has to carefully
study the general strength of (a) the bhava. (b) the

160 How to Judge a Horoscope
karaka, and (c) its lord and the occupants. Of the various
yogas present in the horoscope, those that have a bearing on
the fourth house should be carefully noted.
